_label: J4 hint extension — the three medium problems outside the frozen 125 [PHASE_5.md J4]; identical protocol (words only, no identifiers/numerals/code tokens, ~2 sentences, drafted from statements alone, automated screen clean)

hints.abc327_c: Check three families of constraints: every row, every column, and each of the nine non-overlapping three-by-three blocks must contain each digit exactly once; answer yes only when all checks pass.
hints.abc339_c: The initial passenger count must be just large enough that every running prefix stays non-negative: compute the minimum prefix sum, start from its negation when negative (otherwise zero), and add the overall total.
hints.abc343_c: Enumerate bases upward while the cube stays within the bound, keep the cubes whose decimal form reads the same both ways, and print the largest; the cube root of the bound keeps the loop small.
